mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE(create_time) AS date
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-W%u') AS date
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS date
DATE(create_time) AS date
, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount FROM t_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND provider_id = #{providerId}
AND create_time >= #{startDate}
AND create_time <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY DATE(create_time) DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-W%u') DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') DATE(create_time)
ORDER BY date

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayOrders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status IN ('SERVICE_COMPLETED','EVALUATED','SETTLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayCompletedOrders FROM t_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND provider_id = #{providerId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_price), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(subsidy_amount), 0) AS totalSubsidyAmount, COALESCE(SUM(self_pay_amount), 0) AS totalSelfPayAmount FROM t_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND provider_id = #{providerId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(o.create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today, SUM(CASE WHEN o.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'CREATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS created, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'DISPATCHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dispatched, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'RECEIVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'SERVICE_STARTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS serviceStarted, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN ('SERVICE_COMPLETED','EVALUATED','SETTLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN ('SERVICE_COMPLETED','EVALUATED','SETTLED') THEN o.estimated_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedAmount, COALESCE(AVG(e.overall_score), 0) AS avgRating FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_service_evaluation e ON o.order_id = e.order_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0
AND o.provider_id = #{providerId}
